Off Calendar Aug-24-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantpapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Shaana Rahman, Esq. for Petitioner: Sandra Bolden, present as Guardian ad litem for and with: Justice Bolden a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $16,666.67
Medical Expenses $3,338.05
Costs $9,653.01
A net balance of $20,342.27 to be used for purchase of an ANNUITY as described in Exhibit " A" of the Order.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

Ntc And Mtn To Quash Defts Deposition Subpoenas Or In The Alt To Modify And /Or Limit Depo. Subpoenas
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Shaana A. Rahman, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Justice Bolden and Sandra Bolden
James F. Hannawalt, Deputy City Attorney, for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Justice Bolden and Sandra Bolden's motion to quash or modify deposition subpoena is denied. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to entering into a stipulated protective order before the actual production of the records. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Set For Trial On Nov-17-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-30-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 220
